definition:
ἀγρός, -οῦ, ὁ, 
 [in LXX chiefly for שָׂדֶה ]; 
   1. a field: Mat.6:28, al. 
   2. the country: Mrk.15:21, al.; pl., country places, farms: Mrk.5:14 6:36 56, Luk.8:34 9:12. 
   3. = χωρίον a piece of ground: Mrk.10:29, Act.4:27, al. (On the occurrence of this word as compared with χώρα, χωρίον see MM, VGT, see word)
 (AS)
